allow: Bash(node -e "const { execSync } = require\(''child_process''\); try { const r = execSync\(''npx tsx prisma/seed.ts'', { encoding: ''utf8'', stdio: ''pipe'', env: { ...process.env, DATABASE_URL: ''file:./prisma/test.db'' } }\); console.log\(r\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''ERR:'', e.stderr || e.stdout || e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const { execSync } = require\(''child_process''\); try { const r = execSync\(''npx prisma@5 generate --schema=prisma/schema.test.prisma'', { encoding: ''utf8'', stdio: ''pipe'', env: { ...process.env, DATABASE_URL: ''file:./test.db'' } }\); console.log\(r\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''ERR:'', e.message\); }")
